message:
chore(beads): compact issue tracker history and update current state

Remove 19 superseded beads history snapshots from 2026-02-20 — these
were previously tracked but .br_history/ is now gitignored. The current
issues.jsonl retains all live issue state. History snapshots served their
purpose during the Feb 20 development session and are no longer needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
